unified_frame_statement: David shares his confrontation moment with Coach Malik, showing how facing uncomfortable truths helped him overcome defensive patterns and build genuine accountability.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "Everyone else is the problem, not me."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The heat rising in his face whenever feedback came

the_abyss.realization: "She listed 10 patterns. They were all true."

the_spark.insight_quote: "He made me say out loud what I'd done. Hearing my own voice admit it broke something." (18:32)

sensory_anchors: The crossed arms and tight jaw during hard conversations before
The tears that finally came during the mirror exercise
The open posture and eye contact he maintains now
